summary: Frontend testing completed for Step 2 'Travel Details' in Agent Finder Wizard. All 9 requested features verified successfully: 1) Search for Japan and open Agent Finder wizard, 2) Select agent and go to Step 2, 3) Passport upload area with 'Upload Passport' text, 4) Photo upload area with 'Upload Photo' text, 5) Passport upload triggers loading animation 'Extracting passport data...', 6) Auto-fill of personal info fields (First Name, Last Name, DOB, Gender, Marital Status, Passport Number, Valid Thru, Place of Issue), 7) Flight Details section with Arrival/Departure (date, flight number), 8) Hotel Reservation section (Hotel Name, Check-in, Check-out), 9) Step 5 summary shows applicant name 'Rahul Sharma'.
passed_tests: Search for 'Japan' and click Search button shows visa options
Click 'Explore' button opens Agent Finder Wizard
Step 1 shows agent cards (VisaExperts India, GoVisa Services, etc.)
Select agent and click Continue navigates to Step 2 'Travel Details'
Step 2 shows 'Required Documents' section
'Upload Passport' text visible with upload icon
'Upload Photo' text visible with camera icon
Passport upload triggers 'Extracting passport data...' loading animation with Loader2 spinner
After 2 seconds, 'Passport Uploaded' confirmation with green checkmark appears
'Data auto-filled below' text visible after passport upload
'Auto-filled from passport' badge visible in Personal Information section
First Name auto-filled: 'Rahul'
Last Name auto-filled: 'Sharma'
Date of Birth auto-filled: '1990-05-15' (displayed as 05/15/1990)
Gender auto-filled: 'Male'
Marital Status auto-filled: 'Single'
Passport Number auto-filled: 'P1234567'
Valid Thru auto-filled: '2030-12-31' (displayed as 12/31/2030)
Place of Issue auto-filled: 'New Delhi'
Auto-filled fields have green background (bg-green-50 border-green-300)
'Flight Details' section visible with Plane icon
'Arrival (Inbound)' section with Arrival Date and Flight Number fields
'Departure (Outbound)' section with Departure Date and Flight Number fields
'Hotel Reservation' section visible with Hotel icon
'Hotel Name *' field present
'Check-in Date *' field present
'Check-out Date *' field present
Navigate to Step 3 'Connect' shows 'Request Submitted!' message
Navigate to Step 5 'Track' shows Application Summary
Application Summary shows 'Applicant: Rahul Sharma' (auto-filled name)
critical_code_review_comments: AgentFinderWizard.js correctly implements passport OCR simulation with 2-second delay
Auto-fill correctly populates 8 fields: firstName, lastName, dob, gender, maritalStatus, passportNumber, passportValidThru, placeOfIssue
Loading state (extractingData) properly shows Loader2 spinner with 'Extracting passport data...' text
Success state shows CheckCircle icon with 'Passport Uploaded' and 'Data auto-filled below'
Auto-filled fields correctly styled with bg-green-50 border-green-300
Flight Details section properly structured with Arrival/Departure cards
Hotel Reservation section has all required fields (Hotel Name, Check-in, Check-out)
Step 5 Application Summary correctly displays formData.firstName and formData.lastName
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 2 'Travel Details' fully verified: 1) Document Upload section with passport (triggers OCR simulation) and photo upload areas, 2) Personal Information section with 10 fields - 8 auto-filled from passport (firstName, lastName, dob, gender, maritalStatus, passportNumber, passportValidThru, placeOfIssue) + email and phone manual entry, 3) Flight Details with Arrival/Departure cards (date + flight number each), 4) Hotel Reservation with hotelName, checkIn, checkOut. Passport OCR is MOCKED - uses dummy data after 2 second delay.

passport_ocr.implementation: handlePassportUpload uses setTimeout(2000) to simulate OCR delay, then sets dummy data

passport_upload.initial_state: Upload icon + 'Upload Passport' + 'As required by embassy'

photo_upload.initial_state: Camera icon + 'Upload Photo' + 'As required by embassy'
